title: ayenia urosepala
intro: Ayenia urosepala, also known as the "wild spinach" or "Mexican spinach", is a type of flowering plant in the milkweed family (Apocynaceae). It is a perennial herb native to tropical America, used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ayenia urosepala include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or capsule, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in some parts of Central and South America.
